section.title: Contact us
section.body: Do you have questions about optimizing your energy or want to explore renewable solutions for your company or home?

timeline.question: How long does a project take from audit to commissioning?
timeline.answer: Depending on size and complexity, projects are typically completed within 3 to 6 months. We always communicate clear timelines from the outset.

guarantees.question: What guarantees do installed systems come with?
guarantees.answer: All our systems include an installation warranty and post-commissioning technical follow-up. Equipment comes with manufacturer warranties, which vary by product.

financing.question: Can I finance my project?
financing.answer: Yes. We work with several financial institutions to offer financing options tailored to each project. Contact us and we will advise you with no commitment.

savings.question: What savings can I expect?
savings.answer: Savings depend on current consumption and the installed system, but on average our clients reduce their energy bill by 30% to 70%.

audit.question: What does the energy audit include?
audit.answer: The audit includes historical consumption analysis, evaluation of the solar generation potential at your facility, a technical proposal and an ROI estimate. It is free and without commitment.
